name: Prime Visa

welcome_offer.description: $150 Amazon Gift Card instantly loaded into your Amazon account on approval (requires eligible Prime membership)

earning_rates.category: Amazon.com, Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods Market
earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back with eligible Prime membership. Without Prime: 3%.
5% back on travel purchased through Chase Travel with eligible Prime membership
2% cash back on local transit and commuting (including rideshare)
1% cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Travel Protections
other_benefits.description: Travel Accident Insurance ($500K), Lost Luggage Reimbursement ($3,000), Baggage Delay Insurance ($100/day x 3 days), Auto Rental Coverage (secondary), Roadside Assistance, Travel & Emergency Assistance

other_benefits.name: Purchase Protections
other_benefits.description: Purchase Protection (120 days, $500/item), Extended Warranty (adds 1 year)

notes: No annual credit card fee (but requires $139/year Amazon Prime membership). The 5% rate requires Prime membership. Without Prime, earn 3% at Amazon/Whole Foods. Points are Amazon Reward Dollars redeemable at checkout or as cash back via Chase.
